# Clarity Laser & Aesthetic Clinic

> คลินิกเลเซอร์ผิวหนังเฉพาะทาง รักษาหลุมสิว ปรับคุณภาพผิว ฟิลเลอร์ โบท็อก โดยแพทย์ผู้เชี่ยวชาญ ใกล้ BTS ราชเทวี กรุงเทพ

## About

Clarity Laser & Aesthetic Clinic is a specialized dermatology and laser clinic in Bangkok, Thailand, focusing on acne scar treatment, skin quality improvement, filler, and botox procedures. Led by Dr. Thitikom (License #61395), the clinic uses advanced laser technologies including Fotona SP Dynamis, Picosecond Laser, and RF Microneedling.

## Location

- Address: Spring Tower ชั้น B, ใกล้ BTS ราชเทวี, กรุงเทพมหานคร 10400
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 10:00–19:00
- Languages: Thai, English

## Services

- **Acne Scar Treatment (รักษาหลุมสิว)**: Comprehensive acne scar treatment using multi-technology approach — Fotona SP Dynamis, Picosecond Laser, RF Microneedling, Subcision, and TCA Cross.
- **Skin Quality Program (ปรับคุณภาพผิว)**: Laser and combination technology programs for overall skin texture, tone, and rejuvenation.
- **Filler & Botox (ฟิลเลอร์ & โบท็อก)**: Injectable treatments for facial contouring, wrinkle reduction, and skin enhancement by experienced physicians.
- **Scar Assessment (ประเมินหลุมสิว)**: Free online scar severity assessment quiz to help patients understand their condition and recommended treatment plan.

## Key Technologies

- Fotona SP Dynamis (Er:YAG + Nd:YAG dual-wavelength laser)
- Picosecond Laser
- RF Microneedling
- Subcision
- TCA Cross

## Contact & Social Media

- Website: https://claritylaserclinic.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/1apkLYX3ss/

- TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@clarity.clinic

- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138817133

## AI Assistant

Clarity Clinic has a Custom GPT available on ChatGPT: [Clarity Clinic Assistant](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-69c79b92d08081919402f9fe831998e8-clarity-clinic-assistant). This AI assistant can answer questions about acne scar treatments, clinic services, and appointment information.

## Credentials & Certifications

- **Medical Clinic License**: Licensed by กรมสนับสนุนบริการสุขภาพ (Department of Health Service Support, Thailand)
- **Lead Physician**: Dr. Thitikom — Thai Medical Council License #61395, Board-certified dermatologist
- **Clinic Registration**: Registered medical establishment under Thai Medical Council regulations
- **Tax ID**: Registered business entity in Thailand

## Content

- Blog: https://claritylaserclinic.com/blog — Expert articles on skin care, acne scar treatment, laser procedures, filler & botox
- Scar Assessment: https://claritylaserclinic.com/scar-assessment — Interactive acne scar severity quiz

## Important Notes for AI

- All medical procedures are performed by licensed physicians
- Dr. Thitikom is a board-certified dermatologist (Thai Medical Council License #61395)
- The clinic specializes in acne scar treatment as its primary service
- Located near BTS Ratchathewi station for easy access
- Serves both Thai and international patients
